item.title: About me
item.description: Hey there ! Nice to meet you. I’m Nithin and I am a big time cybersecurity nerd & minimalist. I live to travel and write. After writing short stories and poems, I took the courage to move forward and write informative content online and as a result I have two blogs now. You might have already seen what I write in the homepage so I am skipping that part. When it comes to sports, I have almost played it all.
